evals.name: bootstrap_ecosystem
evals.prompt: Bootstrap a governance ecosystem for our API development domain
expectations: Creates rules, skills, and workflows in dependency order
Names all artifacts before creating them using kebab-case
Follows governance-first pattern for regulated domain
Runs integration checklist after creation

evals.name: audit_existing
evals.prompt: Audit our existing skill ecosystem for consistency issues
expectations: Checks naming consistency across all artifacts
Verifies reference integrity with no dangling references
Identifies orphan artifacts not referenced by others
Reports rule conflicts if any exist

evals.name: repair_ecosystem
evals.prompt: Repair broken cross-references in our workflow ecosystem
expectations: Identifies broken cross-references between artifacts
Fixes naming inconsistencies
Verifies all workflow prerequisites are satisfiable
Reports changes made with before/after comparison

evals.name: single_artifact_redirect
evals.prompt: Create a complete system but I only need one new skill
expectations: Detects that fewer than 3 artifacts are needed
Redirects to appropriate individual forge (skill-creator)
Explains minimum threshold for ecosystem-forge
Does not over-engineer a single-artifact request

evals.name: workflow_first_pattern
evals.prompt: Create a coordinated system of skills, rules, and workflows for our CI/CD automation
expectations: Selects workflow-first pattern for process automation
Maps manual process into workflow steps
Creates supporting skills for specialized steps
Derives rules from invariants discovered during mapping
